# Zscaler B2B: Secure Partner Access | Zscaler

**Source:** https://www.zscaler.com/products-and-solutions/zscaler-b2b
**Captured:** 2026-04-25 via WebFetch.

---

## Title & Value Proposition

**Secure Your B2B Applications** — Provide zero trust site-to-site connectivity and reliable partner access to B2B apps.

Cloud service that gives "business customers secure and fast access to B2B applications" without requiring traditional network infrastructure.

## Core Capabilities

- **Site-to-site B2B connectivity** via zero trust network access (ZTNA)
- **Partner portal access** with browser-based application delivery
- **B2C mobile app access** for consumer-facing applications
- Full TLS/SSL inspection at scale with identity- and context-aware policies

## What B2B Exchange Does

Establishes secure connectivity between business locations and partners to private applications on a "dynamic identity- and context-aware basis." Eliminates complex VPNs while delivering comprehensive visibility into partner activity at user / device / application level.

## ZTNA-Based Architecture

Replaces firewall-centric approaches with a proxy architecture that brokers connections between users and applications based on least-privilege. Applications remain "hidden from the internet" without inbound DMZs or open ports.

## How It Differs from Standard ZPA

- **Standard ZPA**: user → application access (north-south, single-org)
- **Zscaler B2B**: site-to-site connectivity, partner portals, B2C mobile scenarios — gives **external parties** secure access to private B2B apps without network exposure

## Primary Use Cases

- Partner/supplier site-to-site VPN replacement
- Third-party contractor application access
- B2B customer portal delivery
- Server-to-server connectivity over internet
- Mobile application access for B2C customers

## Key Benefits

- Eliminates attack surface (no inbound DMZs, no open ports)
- Prevents DDoS exposure via cloud-native architecture
- Accelerates cloud-app adoption without legacy infrastructure friction
